rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:14 83 105 103 104 95 48 48]>啊，<unk[2:29]>，<Color=red>卓拉领地<Color=white>出了大事，
您听说了吗？
<unk[3:0:268]>据说<Color=red>不明原因的污染物<Color=white>污染了水脉……
对活在水里的卓拉族来说是关乎生死的问题啊。
从这边往东，穿过<Color=red>拉聂尔湿地<Color=white>就能抵达那里了，
本来可是个很值得推荐的地点呢……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:14 83 105 103 104 95 48 48]>啊，<unk[2:29]>，您聽說了嗎？
<Color=red>卓拉領地<Color=white>遇到大麻煩了。
<unk[3:0:268]>好像是水源被<Color=red>不明的髒汙<Color=white>給汙染了……
因為卓拉族是水棲民族，所以聽說情況攸關生死呢。
只要往東邊走，穿越<Color=red>拉聶爾濕地<Color=white>就能抵達那裡了，
那個地方本來可是個值得推薦的景點呢……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:14 83 105 103 104 95 48 48]>ああ <unk[2:29]><unk[5:0]> <Color=red>ゾーラの<Ruby={2:4}さと>里<Color=white>が<Ruby={4:8}たいへん>大変だって<Ruby={2:6}はなし>話
もう<Ruby={2:2}き>聞かれましたか？
<unk[3:0:268]><Color=red><Ruby={8:14}げんいんふめい>原因不明の<Ruby={2:4}よご>汚れ<Color=white>で<Ruby={2:4}みず>水が<Ruby={4:6}おせん>汚染されてしまったとか…<unk[5:0]>
ゾーラ<Ruby={2:4}ぞく>族は<Ruby={2:4}みず>水の<Ruby={2:4}たみ>民だから <Ruby={8:14}しかつもんだい>死活問題らしいですよ
ここから<Ruby={2:6}ひがし>東の <Color=red>ラネール<Ruby={4:8}しつげん>湿原<Color=white>を<Ruby={2:2}こ>越えた<Ruby={2:6}ところ>所にある
おススメスポットなんですけどね…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:14 83 105 103 104 95 48 48]>Say, Link,<unk[5:0]> have you heard about the
trouble in <Color=red>Zora's Domain<Color=white>?<PageBreak><unk[3:0:268]>All that good water polluted by <Color=red>some kind
of mysterious muck<Color=white>. As far as I know,
no one knows where it came from.
It's terrible for the Zora, of course,
being water folk. I'm not sure how
they'll manage.
<Color=red>Zora's Domain<Color=white> is to the east past the
<Color=red>Lanayru Wetlands<Color=white>. I used to recommend
it to tourists, but...well...

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]><unk[2:29]>，您已经决定要往哪里去了吗？
美丽的水之都卓拉领地固然不错，
以稀有遗迹出名的
<Color=red>卡卡利科村<Color=white>也值得一去哦！
<unk[3:0:263]>出了驿站之后往右手边的<Color=red>巨大圆环<Color=white>走，
就不太会迷路了。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]><unk[2:29]>，您已經決定好目的地了嗎？<unk[5:0]>
雖然景色優美的水之都卓拉領地很棒，
不過以罕見遺跡聞名的<Color=red>卡卡利科村<Color=white>
我也非常推薦喔！
<unk[3:0:263]>出了驛站後就可以在右手邊看到一個<Color=red>巨大的環<Color=white>，
只要往那走就不會迷路了。

a popular spot due to its unusual ruins.
Have you seen them?
<unk[3:0:263]>They're hard to miss. As you exit the
stable, head to your right, toward the
<Color=red>big ring<Color=white>.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:26 65 100 109 105 114 97 116 105 111 110 95 48 49]>这是之前
从<Color=red>南方<Color=white>来的客人画的。
据说他在某处的驿站遇到了
一对<Color=red>双胞胎小孩<Color=white>说见到了未知生物，
那幅画就是按照他们的描述……

<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>毕竟是孩子说的话，
叫人半信半疑，
<unk[3:0:263]>但刚好现在<Color=red>驿站协会<Color=white>正热议
<Color=red>未知生物<Color=white>的话题，说不定是真的呢。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:26 65 100 109 105 114 97 116 105 111 110 95 48 49]>這是我前陣子
請某位來自<Color=red>南方<Color=white>的客人幫我畫的。
據說他在某個驛站休息時，
剛好遇到聲稱看見了未知生物的<Color=red>雙胞胎小孩<Color=white>。
所以這模樣是從那兩個小孩口中聽來的……

<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>但畢竟是小孩說出口的，
所以我本來還是有點半信半疑……
<unk[3:0:263]>不過<Color=red>未知生物<Color=white>目前正好在<Color=red>驛站協會<Color=white>裡蔚為話題，
所以我就在想這說不定是真的。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:26 65 100 109 105 114 97 116 105 111 110 95 48 49]>こないだ <Color=red><Ruby={2:6}みなみ>南の<Ruby={2:4}ほう>方<Color=white>から<Ruby={2:2}き>来たお<Ruby={2:6}きゃく>客さんに
<Ruby={2:2}か>描いてもらったんですよ
なんでも どこかの<Ruby={4:8}うまやど>馬宿に<Ruby={2:2}よ>寄った<Ruby={2:4}とき>時に
<Ruby={10:18}みかくにんせいぶつ>未確認生物を<Ruby={2:2}み>見たって<Color=red> <Ruby={4:6}ふたご>双子の<Ruby={4:6}こども>子供<Color=white>がいたらしく
その<Ruby={2:2}こ>子たちから<Ruby={2:2}き>聞いたとかで…

<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>まあ<Ruby={4:6}こども>子供のいう<Ruby={2:4}こと>事なんで
<Ruby={8:14}はんしんはんぎ>半信半疑ではありますが
<unk[3:0:263]><Color=red><Ruby={8:18}うまやどきょうかい>馬宿協会<Color=white>は<Ruby={4:8}さいきん>最近<Color=red> <Ruby={10:18}みかくにんせいぶつ>未確認生物<Color=white>の<Ruby={4:6}わだい>話題で
<Ruby={2:2}も>持ち<Ruby={2:2}き>切りなんで もしかしてと<Ruby={2:4}おも>思いましてね
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:26 65 100 109 105 114 97 116 105 111 110 95 48 49]>That's right! Just a little while ago, a
customer who came from the <Color=red>south<Color=white> drew
them for me.
It seems that there were <Color=red>twin kids <Color=white>at a
stable somewhere who said they'd seen it.<PageBreak>The customer heard all about the beast
and the footprints from those kids.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>Now, I don't tend to believe all of the wild
tales that kids tell, but...<PageBreak><unk[3:0:263]>There's been a lot of chatter around the
<Color=red>Stable Association <Color=white>about this <Color=red>rumored
beast<Color=white>, so I thought it might be true.

rows.TWzh: 再見

<unk[3:0:266]>抱歉……<unk[5:0]>我突然这么兴奋……

<Color=red>未知生物<Color=white>的话题，<unk[5:0]>我就不禁……

<unk[5:0]>我不禁就……

<unk[3:0:266]>すみません…<unk[5:0]> <Ruby={4:6}かって>勝手に<Ruby={2:2}も>盛り<Ruby={2:2}あ>上がっちゃいまして…

rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:260]><unk[4:0:38 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 95 48 48]>咦！？在湖畔驛站！？

……
……
<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:14 83 105 103 104 95 48 49]>是這樣啊……
原來並不是未知生物……
本來以為是未知的存在
所以感到很浪漫的說……
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:26 65 100 109 105 114 97 116 105 111 110 95 48 49]>雖然感覺有點可惜，
不過我還是很感謝您的情報！
驛站是個必須提供正確資訊給客人的地方，
掌握事情的真相才是最重要的！
非常感謝您提供的情報！
基於您對驛站發展的貢獻……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:260]><unk[4:0:38 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 95 48 48]>え？<unk[5:0]> レイクサイド<Ruby={4:8}うまやど>馬宿に！？

…<unk[5:1]>…<unk[5:1]>
……
<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:14 83 105 103 104 95 48 49]>そうですか…<unk[5:0]> <Ruby={10:18}みかくにんせいぶつ>未確認生物じゃ
なかったんですね…
<Ruby={4:4}みち>未知なる<Ruby={4:8}そんざい>存在だから
ロマンがあったんですが…
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:26 65 100 109 105 114 97 116 105 111 110 95 48 49]>でも <Ruby={4:10}じょうほう>情報ありがとうございます！<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:4}すこ>少し<Ruby={4:8}ざんねん>残念なところはありますが
<Ruby={4:8}うまやど>馬宿は お<Ruby={4:10}きゃくさま>客様に<Ruby={2:4}ただ>正しい<Ruby={4:10}じょうほう>情報を<Ruby={4:10}ていきょう>提供する<Ruby={4:6}ばしょ>場所<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={4:8}しんじつ>真実を<Ruby={4:6}はあく>把握することが<Ruby={4:8}だいいち>第一です！
<Ruby={8:20}じょうほうていきょう>情報提供 ありがとうございました！<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={4:8}うまやど>馬宿の<Ruby={4:8}はってん>発展に<Ruby={4:8}こうけん>貢献していただきましたので…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:260]><unk[4:0:38 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 95 48 48]>Huh? At Lakeside Stable?!<PageBreak>...<PageBreak><unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:14 83 105 103 104 95 48 49]>I see... So the rumors about the so-called
beast weren't very true, then.<PageBreak>I must admit, it was thrilling to think that
there was a mysterious beast out there,
ready to spring into the open.
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:26 65 100 109 105 114 97 116 105 111 110 95 48 49]>But thank you for letting me know. As
disappointing as it is, it's better to know
the truth.
Stables should be providing accurate
information for travelers and customers,
so it's important to know the real story!
Thank you for this valuable information.
Since you helped the stable out, here...

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]><unk[2:29]>，<unk[5:0]>
您对咚构的脚印有这么好奇吗？
没想到这就是塞尔达殿下
在湖畔驿站保护的动物……
经常有客人
来询问这个话题，
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]><unk[2:29]>的情报
真是帮大忙了！
提供情报也是驿站的重要职责之一，<unk[5:0]>
比起浪漫，还是事情真相更重要。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]><unk[2:29]>，<unk[5:0]>
您對咚構的腳印就那麼好奇嗎？
真沒想到那居然是薩爾達殿下
委託湖畔驛站幫忙照顧的動物……
有很多客人都因為這樣
而跑來詢問牠的事情。
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]><unk[2:29]>您提供的情報
真的是幫了我一個大忙呢！
提供資訊也是驛站的重責大任之一，<unk[5:0]>
比起浪漫情懷，事情的真相還是比較重要的。

お<Ruby={2:2}と>問い<Ruby={2:2}あ>合わせも<Ruby={2:4}おお>多い<Ruby={4:6}わだい>話題でしたので

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>Link, are you still interested in the
Dondon footprints?<PageBreak>To think that the rumors about a beast
were actually about animals Princess
Zelda cared for at Lakeside Stable...
All sorts of customers had been coming
to ask if those rumors were true.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>Thanks to your information, Link, we can
give them the real story. You really helped
us out!
Providing information is an essential
stable duty. The truth is always more
important than fanciful ideas.

<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>Hm? A customer?<unk[5:0]> Please, allow me to
assist you at the counter.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:267]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76 95 48 48]>喂，<unk[2:29]>！
不要随便拿走驿站的物品啊！
那个据说是当下很受欢迎的吉祥物，
所以这个驿站也会用来装饰。
从这里往东南方向走，在山岳地带的
<Color=red>卡卡利科村<Color=white>就有卖哦！

<unk[3:0:267]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76 95 48 48]>等等，<unk[2:29]>！

所以這間驛站也有裝飾。
位於東南方的山岳地帶
有個名叫<Color=red>卡卡利科村<Color=white>的地方就有在賣了！

この<Ruby={4:8}うまやど>馬宿でも<Ruby={2:4}かざ>飾るようにしているんです

<Color=red>カカリコ<Ruby={2:4}むら>村<Color=white>ってとこで<Ruby={2:2}う>売ってますから！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:267]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76 95 48 48]>Hey, Link! Replacing our furnishings is
such a bother!<PageBreak>That decoration is a popular lucky charm
right now, so we made sure to get one
for our stable.<PageBreak>If you want your own, they sell them
in <Color=red>Kakariko Village<Color=white>, which is in the
mountains to the southeast.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:26 65 100 109 105 114 97 116 105 111 110 95 48 49]>我看机会难得，就想挂上一幅
当下备受热议的<Color=red>环卡遗迹<Color=white>的画作！
环卡遗迹是<Color=red>东南边<Color=white>卡卡利科村里
坠落的圆环形遗迹，
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>来访的客人们
人人都在讨论呢！
<unk[3:0:263]>既然要挂在驿站，
那我希望<Color=red>画中的遗迹要足够大<Color=white>，
而且要<Color=red>保持着
圆环的形状<Color=white>……
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>虽说从这座驿站也能望见，可距离太远，

<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>來這裡的客人，
大家都在討論那東西喔！
<unk[3:0:263]>既然要裝飾的話，

然後上頭要畫著
<Color=red>保持著環狀的遺跡<Color=white>……
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>不過，雖然從這驛站也能看到遺跡，

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:26 65 100 109 105 114 97 116 105 111 110 95 48 49]>Since I'm going to the trouble of hanging
a painting, I'd sure like to hang one of the
<Color=red>Ring Ruins <Color=white>everyone's talking about.
The Ring Ruins are ruins that are each
shaped like rings. They all fell around
Kakariko Village in the <Color=red>southeast<Color=white>.
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>My gosh, are they ever a hot topic with
all the customers who come here!

<unk[3:0:263]>So I'd like to have a<Color=red> BIG painting <Color=white>of them
to hang on the wall. One that shows that
<Color=red>ring-like shape <Color=white>they have.
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>But I can't paint that scene without seeing
it. Sure, I can see some of the ruins from
here, but it's all too far away to see well.
Anyway, I'd really like to do up that
painting, but I'm just not sure how to
go about it.

rows.JPja: <unk[3:0:260]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83 95 48 49]>えっ <unk[5:0]><Color=red>ワッカ<Ruby={4:6}いせき>遺跡の<Ruby={2:2}え>絵<Color=white>をお<Ruby={2:2}も>持ちなんですか？

<unk[3:0:260]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83 95 48 49]>Huh?<unk[5:0]> Wait, do you have a picture of the
<Color=red>Ring Ruins<Color=white>?

Everyone's talking about them these days!

Yes, if you ever want to see some fresh
art up there, just show me a new image!

rows.USen:
They really are huge ruins, aren't they...<unk[5:0]>
Who built those? And why? What was
their purpose?
<unk[3:0:261]><unk[4:0:26 85 110 100 101 114 115 116 97 110 100 95 48 48]>No wonder that ruins falling out of
the sky has caused such a stir all
around Hyrule.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]>多亏<unk[2:29]>相助，我才能挂上这幅画，
我们驿站肯定也会因此出名的！
环卡饰品加上环卡遗迹的画作……<unk[5:0]>
不错，<unk[5:0]>环环相扣的感觉真棒！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]>都是多虧了<unk[2:29]>我才能把畫掛在驛站裡，
我的驛站以後一定會出名的！
環卡飾品再加上環卡遺跡的畫……<unk[5:0]>
嗯嗯，<unk[5:0]>環環相扣感覺真不錯！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]><unk[2:29]>のおかげで <Ruby={2:2}え>絵を<Ruby={2:4}かざ>飾ることができて
ウチの<Ruby={2:4}うま>馬<Ruby={2:4}やど>宿も きっと<Ruby={4:8}ゆうめい>有名になっちゃいますよ！
ワッカ<Ruby={2:4}かざ>飾りに ワッカ<Ruby={4:6}いせき>遺跡の<Ruby={2:2}え>絵…<unk[5:0]>
うんうん<unk[5:0]> ワッカだらけで いい<Ruby={2:4}かん>感じです！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]>Thanks to you, Link, I got that painting
I wanted. Oh, everyone's going to talk
about this stable now!
A ring garland...<unk[5:0]> A picture of the
Ring Ruins...<unk[5:0]> Feels great to have all
these rings right here!

rows.CNzh:

您对那幅<Color=red>环卡遗迹的画作<Color=white>有什么需求？
